message:
test(ufunc): add repeated-zero-root polynomial test and differential cases

- fnp-ufunc: add roots_with_repeated_zero_root test validating that
  polynomial [1, 0, 0] (x^2) correctly returns two zero roots,
  covering the edge case where companion matrix eigenvalue computation
  must preserve root multiplicity
- fnp-conformance: add new polynomial differential test cases for
  extended root-finding coverage

Also flushes beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
